title: Two round shiny UFOs sighted flying over Curitiba [2000]

text_preview:
OCT 22nd, 2000. Time: 14h20pm. Time: 15 minutes. In downtown Curitiba three people observed two round silver shiny UFOs flying fast at an altitude of 10km and going towards the South region “near Santa Cândida”. The UFOs made no noise and left no condensation trails. There were no video recordings or photographs registered. The visibility conditions were good at the time of sighting.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.584. “Questionário sobre avistamento de ovn
summary: Three witnesses in downtown Curitiba observed two round silver shiny UFOs flying fast at 10km altitude heading south, leaving no trails or noise.
